SEARCH
Package project2_root.models

Class ManagerActionsModel

java.lang.Object
project2_root.models.ManagerActionsModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Model
public class ManagerActionsModel extends Object implements Model
Model for the Manager Actions family of views (menu item editing, employee management, and ingredient access).

Owns all business logic and database delegation for CRUD operations on menu items and employees, as well as read access to ingredients. Also provides validation, parsing, and display-formatting helpers consumed by the associated controllers.

  • Constructor Details

    • ManagerActionsModel

      public ManagerActionsModel(POSDatabase database)
      Constructs the model with the given database connection.
      Parameters:
      database - the active POSDatabase instance

  • Method Details

    • navigateToManagerActions

      public void navigateToManagerActions()
      Navigates to the Manager Actions hub view.

    • navigateToOrderInventory

      public void navigateToOrderInventory()
      Navigates to the Order Inventory view.

    • getMenuItems

      public Collection<MenuItem> getMenuItems()
      Returns all menu items from the database, ordered by name.
      Returns:
      a collection of all MenuItem records

    • saveMenuItem

      public void saveMenuItem(int id, String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Persists changes to an existing menu item, including its ingredient quantities. Replaces the item's ingredient associations entirely.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the menu item to update
      name - the updated item name
      cost - the updated price
      ingredients - a map of ingredient ID to quantity; zero-quantity entries should be filtered out before calling

    • addMenuItem

      public void addMenuItem(String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Creates a new menu item with the given name, cost, and ingredient associations.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the new item
      cost - the price of the new item
      ingredients - a map of ingredient ID to quantity

    • getEmployees

      public Collection<Employee> getEmployees()
      Returns all employees from the database, ordered by last name.
      Returns:
      a collection of all Employee records

    • saveEmployee

      public void saveEmployee(int employeeId, String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Persists changes to an existing employee record.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee to update
      firstName - the updated first name
      lastName - the updated last name
      isManager - whether the employee should have manager privileges

    • addEmployee

      public void addEmployee(String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Creates a new employee record with the given details.
      Parameters:
      firstName - the new employee's first name
      lastName - the new employee's last name
      isManager - whether the employee should have manager privileges

    • getAllIngredients

      public Collection<Ingredient> getAllIngredients()
      Returns all ingredients from the database, ordered by name.
      Returns:
      a collection of all Ingredient records

    • validateMenuItem

      public String validateMenuItem(String name, String rawCost)
      Validates menu item form input.
      Parameters:
      name - the item name to validate
      rawCost - the raw cost string to validate
      Returns:
      an error message string if invalid, or null if valid

    • parseCost

      public double parseCost(String rawCost)
      Parses a raw cost string into a double.
      Parameters:
      rawCost - the trimmed cost string; must be a valid decimal number
      Returns:
      the parsed cost value

    • buildIngredientMap

      public Map<Integer,Integer> buildIngredientMap(Map<Integer,Integer> rawQuantities)
      Filters a raw ingredient quantity map down to only entries with a quantity greater than zero.
      Parameters:
      rawQuantities - a map of ingredient ID to raw spinner value
      Returns:
      a filtered map containing only non-zero quantities

    • validateEmployee

      public String validateEmployee(String firstName, String lastName)
      Validates employee form input.
      Parameters:
      firstName - the first name to validate
      lastName - the last name to validate
      Returns:
      an error message string if invalid, or null if valid

    • formatMenuItemLabel

      public String formatMenuItemLabel(MenuItem item)
      Formats a menu item for display in a list button.
      Parameters:
      item - the menu item to format
      Returns:
      a string in the form "Name — $0.00"

    • formatMenuItemCost

      public String formatMenuItemCost(MenuItem item)
      Formats a menu item's cost for display in a text field.
      Parameters:
      item - the menu item whose cost to format
      Returns:
      the cost as a two-decimal string, e.g. "3.50"

    • formatEmployeeLabel

      public String formatEmployeeLabel(Employee employee)
      Formats an employee for display in a list button.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee to format
      Returns:
      the employee's full name, suffixed with " [Manager]" if applicable

    • formatEmployeeId

      public String formatEmployeeId(Employee employee)
      Formats an employee's ID for display in the edit form.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee whose ID to format
      Returns:
      the employee ID as a plain string
